name: Zenith Era Corporation Chartered Division
desc: A chartered Zenith Era branch established by agreement with the local government. Zenith provides premium infrastructure, port services, and corporate administration in exchange for privileged access to local markets.

name: Yunze General Ordnance Chartered Branch
desc: A chartered Yunze General Ordnance branch established by agreement with the local government. Yunze supplies security infrastructure, weapons logistics, and procurement channels in exchange for long-term operating rights.

name: Monolith Ordnance Chartered Division
desc: A chartered Monolith Ordnance branch established by agreement with the local government. In exchange for broad operating rights, the group underwrites most heavy infrastructure and security construction in the area.

name: Flicker Aviation Chartered Division
